---
title: Squared coefficient of variation
jupyter: python3
---



### Set up and get data

```{python}
## Import modules
import os
import abct
import numpy as np
from scipy import io
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.subplots as sp

## Unpack data
data = io.loadmat(os.path.join(".", "data", "hcp_data.mat"))
connectivity = data["connectivity"]
activity = data["activity"]
coactivity = activity.T @ activity

k = 5           # Number of components 
repl = 100      # Number of replicates
```

### First and second degrees

```{python}
WB = abct.kneighbors(connectivity)
CB = abct.kneighbors(coactivity)
```

```{python}
WCV2 = abct.coefvar2(WB)
CCV2 = abct.coefvar2(CB)
```
